title: Revamped Worldborder
description: Change worldborder settings for each individual world
body:
## 🛠️ Features
- Change worldborder settings individualy without affecting the other dimensions by useing vanilla commands:

To change worldborder in the dimension you are in:
```
/worldborder <args>
```

To change worldborder in other dimension:
```
/execute in <dimension> run worldborder <args>
```

- Those settings are saved in level.dat file and are restored when the world is loaded

## ❓ F.A.Q.
### Why choose this mod when others do the exact same thing?
This mod only uses existing Minecraft protocols which does not require you to install the mod on the client-side.

Ask for more feature on my [GitHub repo](https://github.com/N4TH4NOT/Revamped-WorldBorder/issues) !
